'''Ovise III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]] on the [[Annaj-Houche Run]].

==Geography==
Ovise III was an urban, industrialized world that was dominated by [[Factory/Legends|factories]] of varying types. It was the home of the [[Tripartite Lines]] company. The planet's [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] was 1.05 times that found on a standard world such as [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The length of a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] on Ovise III was 26 [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]], and a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] lasted for 372 [[Local day/Legends|local days]].

==History==
The planet was inhabited as early as [[1100 BBY/Legends|1100 BBY]]. It was about this time that [[Zephyrus]] had equipment outfitters on Ovise III equip the ''[[Sickly Tremor]]'' with [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] cages to hold powerful slaves (presumably [[Phlog/Legends|Phlogs]].)

The planet became highly polluted due to the unregulated growth of industry; the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] eventually took control of Ovise III when it moved into and occupied the [[Inner Zuma Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
